ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Sparse — graph is mostly file structure
ast.target: 稀疏 — 图形主要是文件结构

ast.name: title
ast.source: Run a graph pull from settings to materialize the rest as files.
ast.target: 从设置运行图形拉取以将其余部分物化为文件。

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: Ollama本地（推荐用于大量数据摄入）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: Gemini（云端，免费层 — 有速率限制）

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Switching to a provider requires a key configured in
ast.target: 切换到某个提供商需要在

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: above. Providers without a key are greyed out below.
ast.target: 中配置密钥。没有密钥的提供商在下方显示为灰色。

ast.name: info
ast.source: [Cortex] Daily extraction cap reached — files will be embedded but not graph-extracted
ast.target: [Cortex] 已达到每日提取上限 — 文件将被嵌入但不会进行图谱提取

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Cloud uses the hosted API. Local runs everything on your machine via docker.
ast.target: 云端使用托管 API。本地通过 docker 在您的机器上运行所有内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated folder prefixes. Empty = include everything not excluded.
ast.target: 逗号分隔的文件夹前缀。留空 = 包含所有未排除的内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run a full vault sync when Obsidian launches. Skips files unchanged since the last sync.
ast.target: Obsidian 启动时运行一次完整的保险库同步。跳过自上次同步以来未更改的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated path prefixes to skip when pushing.
ast.target: 推送时要跳过的逗号分隔路径前缀。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ingest images, pdfs, and other binaries referenced by your notes.
ast.target: 摄取您的笔记引用的图像、PDF 和其他二进制文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where pulled entity files live. Folder is excluded from sync to prevent feedback loops.
ast.target: 拉取的实体文件存放位置。该文件夹被排除在同步之外，以防止反馈循环。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of entity types to pull. Leave empty to pull a sensible default set (concept, person, organization, topic, location, event, …).
ast.target: 要拉取的实体类型逗号分隔列表。留空以拉取一组合理的默认类型（概念、人物、组织、主题、地点、事件等）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add `cortex_entities` frontmatter to your existing notes that mention pulled entities — creates bidirectional wikilinks.
ast.target: 在提及拉取实体的现有笔记中添加 `cortex_entities` 前置元数据 — 创建双向维基链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Summary is a fast (~50ms) estimate from graph stats. Preview is a full dry-run that fetches every entity for exact diffs. Pull from cloud writes to disk.
ast.target: 摘要是基于图谱统计的快速（约50毫秒）估计。预览是一次完整的试运行，会获取每个实体以计算精确差异。从云端拉取会写入磁盘。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which sidebar opens at startup — chat over your knowledge graph, or semantically similar notes for the current file.
ast.target: 启动时打开哪个侧边栏 — 基于您的知识图谱进行聊天，或为当前文件显示语义相似的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show ghost-text [[wikilink]] suggestions while typing — driven by entity matches in your graph. Tab to accept, esc to dismiss.
ast.target: 在输入时显示幽灵文本 [[维基链接]] 建议 — 由您图谱中的实体匹配驱动。按 Tab 接受，按 Esc 关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After every chat answer, automatically push its cited entities into Obsidian's graph view filter \u2014 non-matching nodes dim, matching ones stay highlighted. Toggle is also accessible from the "show on graph" button on each answer.
ast.target: 每次聊天回答后，自动将其引用的实体推送到 Obsidian 的图谱视图过滤器中 — 不匹配的节点变暗，匹配的节点保持高亮。切换按钮也可通过每个回答上的“在图谱上显示”按钮访问。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Single-shot retrieval (default) is fastest and simplest. The agent mode uses the server-side tool-calling harness — the model decides which tools to call (knowledge graph search, multi-hop paths, optionally web search), iterates, and synthesizes — slower but much better on multi-step questions.
ast.target: 单次检索（默认）最快且最简单。智能体模式使用服务器端的工具调用框架 — 模型决定调用哪些工具（知识图谱搜索、多跳路径，可选网络搜索），迭代并综合 — 速度较慢，但在多步骤问题上表现更好。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reusable bundle of system prompt + default tools + bounds. "Obsidian chat" is vault-aware with optional web fallback. "vault q&a" stays inside your knowledge graph. "multi-hop" enables sub-agents for hard, decomposable questions.
ast.target: 可重用的系统提示 + 默认工具 + 边界包。“Obsidian 聊天”具有保险库感知能力，并可选网络回退。“保险库问答”仅限于您的知识图谱。“多跳”为复杂的可分解问题启用子智能体。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When on, agent runs stream live — per-iteration progress, tool-call cards, and the final answer all render as they happen.
ast.target: 开启后，智能体运行将实时流式传输 — 每次迭代的进度、工具调用卡片和最终答案都会在发生时渲染。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When on, the agent can call web_search and web_scrape for current external information. Off by default — privacy-conscious users may not want their chat queries hitting the public web.
ast.target: 开启后，智能体可以调用 web_search 和 web_scrape 来获取当前外部信息。默认关闭 — 注重隐私的用户可能不希望他们的聊天查询访问公共网络。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the persistent get-started panel — connect, sync, run a query, connect external agents.
ast.target: 打开持久化的入门面板 — 连接、同步、运行查询、连接外部智能体。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Quick start, agent setup, troubleshooting, and the full plugin guide.
ast.target: 快速入门、智能体设置、故障排除以及完整的插件指南。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-save the YAML when you change provider keys, then run docker compose up -d --force-recreate to apply.
ast.target: 当您更改提供商密钥时，请重新保存 YAML，然后运行 docker compose up -d --force-recreate 以应用更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defaults to HTTP://localhost:3400 — only change if you remapped the port.
ast.target: 默认为 HTTP://localhost:3400 — 仅在您重新映射端口时更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Auto-generated. Only change if you want multiple isolated graphs in the same postgres.
ast.target: 自动生成。仅当您想在同一 postgres 中拥有多个隔离图谱时才更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Org-scoped API key from your hangarx dashboard.
ast.target: 来自您的 hangarx 仪表板的组织范围 API 密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Found in your hangarx workspace settings (settings → workspaces).
ast.target: 在您的 hangarx 工作区设置中找到（设置 → 工作区）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which provider runs chat completions. Greyed-out providers need a key configured first.
ast.target: 哪个提供商运行聊天补全。灰色显示的提供商需要先配置密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specific model from the chosen provider.
ast.target: 所选提供商的特定模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Leave blank to keep the existing key. Required only when switching providers or rotating.
ast.target: 可选。留空以保留现有密钥。仅在切换提供商或轮换密钥时需要。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required for the connect buttons above. On by default — binds to 127.0.0.1 only and requires a bearer token.
ast.target: 上方连接按钮所需。默认开启 — 仅绑定到 127.0.0.1 并需要承载令牌。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Port to bind to (default 7474). Change requires server restart.
ast.target: 要绑定的端口（默认 7474）。更改需要重启服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Bearer token required by clients. Keep it secret.
ast.target: 客户端所需的承载令牌。请保密。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where embedding calls run. Gemini is fastest to start (free tier, rate-limited). Switch to Ollama for unlimited local embeddings once your vault grows — requires installing Ollama and running `ollama pull nomic-embed-text`.
ast.target: 嵌入调用运行的位置。Gemini 启动最快（免费层，有速率限制）。当您的保险库增长后，切换到 Ollama 以获得无限的本地嵌入 — 需要安装 Ollama 并运行 `ollama pull nomic-embed-text`。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在图谱上自动高亮聊天回答

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Allow web search in agent chat
ast.target: 允许智能体聊天中使用网络搜索

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 已保存的云端 API 密钥

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用本地 MCP 服务器

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 思考中…（快速路径 — 简单查询）

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Why did the agent say that?

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 正在重新推送所有笔记…

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 同步已阻止 — 存储空间已达上限

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 同步已暂停 — 额度已耗尽

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Pull entities and relationships from your Cortex cloud workspace into your vault as markdown files. Pulled notes appear in Obsidian's native graph view, with [[wikilinks]] for every relationship. Re-running is incremental — only changed entities are rewritten.
ast.target: 将实体和关系从您的 Cortex 云工作区拉取到您的保险库中，保存为 Markdown 文件。拉取的笔记将出现在 Obsidian 的原生图谱视图中，并为每个关系生成 [[wikilinks]]。重新运行是增量的 — 仅重写已更改的实体。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Cannot reach server to confirm web-search backend. Open the dashboard to verify.
ast.target: 无法连接到服务器以确认网络搜索后端。请打开仪表板进行验证。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 失败 — 请检查控制台

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 复制 LLM 设置提示

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Each vault on this machine gets its own scope so notes from a different vault never leak into your queries. Auto-generated; resetting it creates a fresh, empty graph for this vault.
ast.target: 此机器上的每个保险库都有自己的范围，因此来自不同保险库的笔记永远不会泄露到您的查询中。自动生成；重置它会为此保险库创建一个全新的空图谱。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Child_process unavailable on this platform — copy the command above and run it in a terminal.
ast.target: 此平台不支持 child_process — 请复制上面的命令并在终端中运行。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Topic clusters group densely-connected notes, with an LLM-generated summary per group. Useful for "what topics dominate my vault?" and as retrieval seeds during chat.
ast.target: 主题集群将连接紧密的笔记分组，每个组都有一个由 LLM 生成的摘要。可用于“我的保险库中哪些主题占主导？”以及在聊天期间作为检索种子。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Fast estimate from graph stats — run preview for exact counts.
ast.target: 基于图谱统计的快速估算 — 运行预览以获取精确计数。

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 复制 MCP 代码片段

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 复制 curl 测试命令

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Sync this note to knowledge graph
ast.target: 将此笔记同步到知识图谱

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 将完整密钥复制到剪贴板

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Validate the API key by calling /v1/API-keys/whoami
ast.target: 通过调用 /v1/API-keys/whoami 验证 API 密钥

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Verify the key by calling the provider through the local cortex-API.
ast.target: 通过本地 Cortex API 调用提供商来验证密钥。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Cortex MCP] Failed to write memory note:
ast.target: [Cortex MCP] 写入记忆笔记失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Cortex MCP] Failed to ingest new memory note (will be picked up on next full sync):
ast.target: [Cortex MCP] 摄取新记忆笔记失败（将在下次全量同步时处理）：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Cortex] 自动保存聊天笔记失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Cortex] markdown render failed, retrying with sanitized input:
ast.target: [Cortex] Markdown 渲染失败，正在使用清理后的输入重试：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Cortex] markdown render failed after sanitize, falling back to plaintext:
ast.target: [Cortex] 清理后 Markdown 渲染仍然失败，回退到纯文本：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Cortex] Couldn't load model registry, using fallback list:
ast.target: [Cortex] 无法加载模型注册表，正在使用备用列表：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Cortex] Couldn't push BYOK to runtime config:
ast.target: [Cortex] 无法将 BYOK 推送到运行时配置：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Cortex] Failed to load sync index, starting fresh:
ast.target: [Cortex] 加载同步索引失败，正在重新开始：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Cortex] 预检存储估算失败（继续执行）：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Cortex] 同步已停止 — 额度已耗尽：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Cortex] 同步已停止 — 存储空间已达上限：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No entities returned in this answer.
ast.target: 此回答中未返回任何实体。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't resolve any of the cited entities. Run a graph pull first?
ast.target: 无法解析任何被引用的实体。是否先运行一次图谱拉取？

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法打开 Obsidian 的图谱视图。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't apply the graph filter — query copied to clipboard, paste it into the filters panel.
ast.target: 无法应用图谱过滤器 — 查询已复制到剪贴板，请将其粘贴到过滤器面板中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: API key is empty. Open settings → connection.
ast.target: API 密钥为空。请打开设置 → 连接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Workspace ID is empty. Open settings → connection.
ast.target: 工作区 ID 为空。请打开设置 → 连接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Browser blocked the new window. URL copied to clipboard — paste it in your browser to continue sign-in.
ast.target: 浏览器阻止了新窗口。URL 已复制到剪贴板 — 请将其粘贴到浏览器中以继续登录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Received an OAUTH callback but no sign-in is in progress. Ignoring.
ast.target: 收到 OAUTH 回调，但当前没有进行中的登录。已忽略。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Docker 桌面版启动仅限桌面端。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Child_process unavailable. Open docker desktop manually.
ast.target: Child_process 不可用。请手动打开 Docker 桌面版。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已启动 Docker 桌面版。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't launch docker desktop. Open it manually from applications.
ast.target: 无法启动 Docker 桌面版。请从应用程序中手动打开。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't launch docker desktop. Open it from the start menu.
ast.target: 无法启动 Docker 桌面版。请从开始菜单中打开。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't launch Docker Desktop. Run `docker-desktop` from a terminal.
ast.target: 无法启动 Docker Desktop。请在终端中运行 `docker-desktop`。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unsupported platform for docker desktop launch.
ast.target: 不支持在此平台上启动 Docker 桌面版。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't open the file manager from this build of Obsidian.
ast.target: 无法从此版本的 Obsidian 打开文件管理器。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Mcp 配置代码片段已复制。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 工作区 ID 已复制。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Curl one-liner copied — paste in any terminal to verify connectivity.
ast.target: Curl 单行命令已复制 — 粘贴到任意终端以验证连接性。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 复制失败 — 改为选择文本。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cloud API key is empty. Open settings → connection details and sign in or paste a key.
ast.target: 云 API 密钥为空。请打开设置 → 连接详情并登录或粘贴密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cloud workspace ID is empty. Open settings → connection details.
ast.target: 云工作区 ID 为空。请打开设置 → 连接详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vault has no Markdown files to sync.
ast.target: 保险库中没有可同步的 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Everything was already up to date.
ast.target: 所有内容均已为最新状态。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Hangarx: vault has no Markdown files to sync.
ast.target: Hangarx：保险库中没有可同步的 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在重建社区 + 重新索引…

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Rebuild failed — see console for details.
ast.target: 重建失败 — 详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: aria-label
ast.target: 附加文件（仅限文本，临时）

ast.name: aria-label
ast.source: Auto-highlight every answer on the graph
ast.target: 在图谱上自动高亮每个回答

ast.name: body
ast.source:
This wipes the local sync index and re-pushes every note into the knowledge graph.

Use after the server graph has been reset (Docker volume wiped, container rebuilt). Your notes themselves aren't touched.
ast.target: 这将清除本地同步索引，并将每条笔记重新推送到知识图谱中。\n\n在服务器图谱被重置（Docker 卷被清除、容器重建）后使用此功能。您的笔记本身不会被修改。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Going back hides the progress UI but the sync keeps running. Continue?
ast.target: 返回将隐藏进度界面，但同步将继续运行。是否继续？

ast.name: body
ast.source: A new vaultId will be generated. The existing scoped data on the local server will be orphaned (not deleted, but unreachable from this vault). Use this only when you intentionally want a fresh graph.
ast.target: 将生成一个新的 vaultId。本地服务器上现有的作用域数据将成为孤立数据（不会被删除，但无法从此保险库访问）。仅在您有意创建全新图谱时使用此选项。

ast.name: body
ast.source: You'll need to sign in again next time you switch to Cloud mode.
ast.target: 下次切换到云模式时，您需要重新登录。

ast.name: body
ast.source:
This wipes the local sync index and re-pushes every file into the knowledge graph.

Use this after the server-side graph has been reset (e.g. Docker volume wiped). It's safe \u2014 your notes themselves aren't touched.
ast.target: 这将清除本地同步索引，并将每个文件重新推送到知识图谱中。\n\n在服务器端图谱被重置（例如 Docker 卷被清除）后使用此功能。这是安全的 — 您的笔记本身不会被修改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: What to search for, in natural language.
ast.target: 要搜索的内容，使用自然语言描述。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Max items per source (default 5 each → up to 10 total).
ast.target: 每个来源的最大项目数（默认各5个 → 最多共10个）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fact or insight to persist. Self-contained sentence; do not rely on conversational context.
ast.target: 要持久化的事实或洞察。应为自包含的句子；不要依赖对话上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional short title for the memory note.
ast.target: 记忆笔记的可选简短标题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One of: agent_memory (default), user_fact, decision, insight.

ast.name: description
ast.target: 用于后续筛选的可选标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find notes related to a specific note in the user's vault. Use this when you have a concrete note title and want to discover what else the user has linked to or near it. Returns ranked notes with their relationship type (wikilink, embedding similarity, extracted entity).
ast.target: 在用户保险库中查找与特定笔记相关的笔记。当您有一个具体的笔记标题，并想发现用户还链接或关联了哪些其他内容时使用此功能。返回按相关性排序的笔记及其关系类型（wikilink、嵌入相似度、提取的实体）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exact note title to find related notes for.
ast.target: 用于查找相关笔记的精确笔记标题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trace the shortest paths through the knowledge graph between two notes or entities. Use this to answer "how is A related to B?" \u2014 returns the chain of intermediate concepts/people/projects that connect them. Multi-hop reasoning over the user's graph.
ast.target: 在知识图谱中追踪两个笔记或实体之间的最短路径。用于回答“A与B有何关联？”——返回连接它们的中间概念/人物/项目链。对用户图谱进行多跳推理。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 考虑的最大图谱距离（默认为3）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search the knowledge graph for entities (people, concepts, projects, organizations, etc.) by name fragment. Use when the user mentions something by partial name and you need to disambiguate or find the canonical entity ID before further queries.
ast.target: 通过名称片段在知识图谱中搜索实体（人物、概念、项目、组织等）。当用户提及部分名称，需要消歧或找到规范实体ID以进行进一步查询时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Partial or full name to search for.
ast.target: 要搜索的部分或完整名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List inconsistencies the system has detected across the user's notes — claims that directly conflict, temporal contradictions, or value mismatches. Use when reviewing a topic to surface what the user may have changed their mind about.
ast.target: 列出系统在用户笔记中检测到的不一致之处——直接冲突的主张、时间矛盾或数值不匹配。在回顾某个主题时使用，以揭示用户可能改变想法的地方。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 返回的最大矛盾数（默认为25）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For a specific note, suggest other notes/entities the user should consider linking to. Useful when helping the user develop a note further or build out their knowledge graph. Driven by entity-extraction across the vault.
ast.target: 针对特定笔记，建议用户应考虑链接的其他笔记/实体。在帮助用户进一步发展笔记或构建其知识图谱时很有用。基于整个知识库中的实体提取。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ask a synthesized natural-language question against the user's knowledge base. Returns a generated answer with citations. Prefer cortex_recall for raw retrieval — use cortex_ask when the user wants a one-shot summarized answer rather than individual sources.
ast.target: 针对用户的知识库提出一个综合性的自然语言问题。返回一个带有引用的生成答案。优先使用cortex_recall进行原始检索——当用户想要一个一次性总结的答案而非单个来源时，使用cortex_ask。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Scrape a web page and add it to the user's knowledge graph as a new document, with extracted entities and relationships. Use when the user shares a link they want preserved in their notes.
ast.target: 抓取一个网页并将其作为新文档添加到用户的知识图谱中，包含提取的实体和关系。当用户分享一个希望保存在笔记中的链接时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URL to scrape and ingest.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional title override for the document.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative path. File → just that file. Folder → all markdown under it. Omit → full vault.
ast.target: 可选的相对于知识库的路径。文件 → 仅该文件。文件夹 → 其下所有Markdown文件。省略 → 整个知识库。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Skip post-ingest VDB indexing + community detection for speed. Caller should run "Rebuild communities + reindex" afterwards if used.
ast.target: 为加快速度，跳过摄取后的VDB索引和社区检测。如果使用此选项，调用者应随后运行“重建社区+重新索引”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bypass the per-file hash check so every file is re-ingested. Use when the server graph has been wiped/reset and the local index falsely reports files as already synced.
ast.target: 绕过每个文件的哈希检查，以便重新摄取每个文件。当服务器图谱已被清除/重置且本地索引错误地报告文件已同步时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Restrict dedup to one entity type (e.g. "Note", "Concept"). Omit to dedup all types.
ast.target: 将去重限制为单一实体类型（例如“笔记”、“概念”）。省略则对所有类型去重。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When true, return the merge plan without mutating the graph.
ast.target: 为true时，返回合并计划而不修改图谱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cap on duplicate groups to inspect per call (default 5000).
ast.target: 每次调用检查的最大重复组数上限（默认为5000）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Return the markdown note the user currently has open in Obsidian. Use this whenever the user says "this note", "this file", or asks a question without naming a specific note \u2014 they almost always mean whatever's focused. Returns null if no markdown file is active (canvas, image, etc.).
ast.target: 返回用户当前在Obsidian中打开的Markdown笔记。每当用户说“这个笔记”、“这个文件”或未指明具体笔记就提问时使用——他们几乎总是指当前聚焦的内容。如果没有活动的Markdown文件（画布、图像等），则返回null。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Truncate content past this many characters (default 8000).
ast.target: 超过此字符数后截断内容（默认为8000）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List the user's most recently modified markdown notes. Use to understand what they've been working on, find a note they referenced without naming, or surface "recently touched" context for an answer.
ast.target: 列出用户最近修改的Markdown笔记。用于了解他们最近的工作内容，找到他们提及但未命名的笔记，或为答案提供“最近接触”的上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 返回的最大笔记数（默认为10，最大为50）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the markdown note to delete.
ast.target: 要删除的Markdown笔记相对于知识库的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When true, bypass trash and delete the file irrecoverably. Default false.
ast.target: 为true时，绕过回收站并不可逆地删除文件。默认为false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fetch the full content of a specific note by vault-relative path. Use after a search tool (cortex_search_entities, cortex_related, cortex_recall) returns a path and you need to read the full note rather than a snippet.
ast.target: 通过相对于知识库的路径获取特定笔记的完整内容。在搜索工具（cortex_search_entities、cortex_related、cortex_recall）返回路径后使用，需要阅读完整笔记而非片段时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the markdown note.
ast.target: Markdown笔记相对于知识库的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Truncate content past this many characters (default 16000).
ast.target: 超过此字符数后截断内容（默认为16000）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Files exist locally but no matching Note entity in the graph. These haven't been synced yet.
ast.target: 文件在本地存在，但图谱中没有匹配的笔记实体。这些文件尚未同步。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Local file mtime is newer than the last-synced timestamp. The graph likely has stale content.
ast.target: 本地文件的修改时间比上次同步的时间戳新。图谱中的内容可能已过时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Note entities in the graph with no matching vault file. Usually means the file was deleted locally and the deletion didn't propagate, or the graph was pulled from a different vault.
ast.target: 图谱中的笔记实体没有匹配的知识库文件。通常意味着文件在本地被删除但删除未传播，或者图谱是从不同的知识库拉取的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Local file matches the graph version. No action needed.
ast.target: 本地文件与图谱版本匹配。无需操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Send your changed notes to the knowledge graph. Skips files that haven't changed since last sync.
ast.target: 将您更改的笔记发送到知识图谱。跳过自上次同步以来未更改的文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Materialize knowledge graph entities + relationships as markdown so they appear in Obsidian's graph view.
ast.target: 将知识图谱的实体和关系具体化为Markdown，以便它们出现在Obsidian的图谱视图中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Push first, then import. Keeps both sides aligned.
ast.target: 先推送，再导入。保持两端同步。

ast.name: description
ast.source: See what's out of sync — local notes missing from the knowledge graph, knowledge graph entities orphaned, files newer than their last sync.
ast.target: 查看哪些内容不同步——本地笔记在知识图谱中缺失、知识图谱实体孤立、文件比其上次同步时间新。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wipes the local sync index and re-pushes every note. Use after the server knowledge graph has been reset (e.g. Docker volume wiped).
ast.target: 清除本地同步索引并重新推送所有笔记。在服务器知识图谱被重置（例如Docker卷被清除）后使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add as a Custom Connector under Settings → Connectors.
ast.target: 在设置 → 连接器下添加为自定义连接器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add as an MCP server in Settings → Connections (desktop only).
ast.target: 在设置 → 连接（仅限桌面版）下添加为MCP服务器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add to ~/.cursor/mcp.json on the remote machine — same shape as the local connector.
ast.target: 在远程机器上添加到 ~/.cursor/mcp.json —— 与本地连接器结构相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any client that supports remote MCP via HTTP + API key.
ast.target: 任何支持通过HTTP + API密钥进行远程MCP的客户端。

ast.name: error
ast.source: cortex_dedupe requires cortex-api 1.0.2 or later. Re-save docker-compose.cortex.yml from the setup wizard and `docker compose up -d --force-recreate` to pull the new image.
ast.target: cortex_dedupe 需要 cortex-api 1.0.2 或更高版本。请从设置向导重新保存 docker-compose.cortex.yml 文件，并运行 `docker compose up -d --force-recreate` 以拉取新镜像。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The agent run errored before producing an answer.
ast.target: 代理运行在生成答案前出错。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The Gemini/OpenAI/Anthropic key the server is using has expired. Open Settings → HangarX → LLM and paste a fresh key, then save.
ast.target: 服务器使用的 Gemini/OpenAI/Anthropic 密钥已过期。请打开设置 → HangarX → LLM，粘贴一个新密钥，然后保存。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The key the server sent isn't valid. Open Settings → HangarX → LLM and paste a working key, then save.
ast.target: 服务器发送的密钥无效。请打开设置 → HangarX → LLM，粘贴一个有效的密钥，然后保存。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Your LLM provider account is out of quota or unbilled. Top up the provider account or switch to a different provider in Settings → HangarX → LLM.
ast.target: 您的LLM提供商账户额度不足或未计费。请为提供商账户充值，或在设置 → HangarX → LLM 中切换到其他提供商。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The model is overloaded on the provider's side. Wait a minute and retry, or switch model in Settings → HangarX → LLM.
ast.target: 模型在提供商端过载。请稍等一分钟重试，或在设置 → HangarX → LLM 中切换模型。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Open Settings → HangarX. In Cloud mode, sign in again or regenerate your API key in the dashboard. In Local mode, your container is running an older build that still requires a key — re-save the Compose file and rebuild with `docker compose -f docker-compose.cortex.yml up -d --force-recreate`.
ast.target: 打开设置 → HangarX。在云端模式下，请重新登录或在仪表板中重新生成您的API密钥。在本地模式下，您的容器运行的是仍需要密钥的旧版本——请重新保存Compose文件并使用 `docker compose -f docker-compose.cortex.yml up -d --force-recreate` 重新构建。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Your API key isn't scoped to this workspace. Use a key with access, or switch workspaces.
ast.target: 您的API密钥未授权访问此工作区。请使用具有访问权限的密钥，或切换工作区。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The endpoint or entity doesn't exist. If you just synced, give it a few seconds and retry.
ast.target: 端点或实体不存在。如果您刚刚同步，请稍等几秒钟再重试。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: HangarX is throttling requests. Wait ~30s and try again.
ast.target: HangarX正在限制请求。请等待约30秒后重试。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The upstream service is overloaded. Wait a moment and retry.
ast.target: 上游服务过载。请稍等片刻后重试。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Check the cortex-api logs (`docker logs cortex-api`) for the underlying cause.
ast.target: 请检查 cortex-api 日志（`docker logs cortex-api`）以了解根本原因。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The API hostname couldn't be resolved. Check Settings → Connection → API URL — typo, wrong domain (.com vs .ai), or DNS issue. In Local mode the URL should be http://localhost:3400.
ast.target: 无法解析API主机名。请检查设置 → 连接 → API URL——是否有拼写错误、域名错误（.com 与 .ai）或DNS问题。在本地模式下，URL应为 http://localhost:3400。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Nothing is listening on that port. In Local mode, run `docker compose ps` to confirm containers are up; check the port matches your compose file.
ast.target: 该端口没有服务在监听。在本地模式下，运行 `docker compose ps` 确认容器是否已启动；检查端口是否与您的compose文件匹配。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Your network is offline. Reconnect, or switch to Local mode if you have the Docker stack running.
ast.target: 您的网络已离线。请重新连接，或者如果您运行了Docker堆栈，请切换到本地模式。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The server's certificate is invalid or expired. If you trust this host, you may need to update it; otherwise contact the API administrator.
ast.target: 服务器的证书无效或已过期。如果您信任此主机，可能需要更新它；否则请联系API管理员。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The API isn't responding. In Local mode, run `docker compose ps` to confirm containers are up. Otherwise check your internet connection.
ast.target: API没有响应。在本地模式下，运行 `docker compose ps` 确认容器是否已启动。否则请检查您的互联网连接。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The request body wasn't accepted. This is usually a plugin bug — please report.
ast.target: 请求体未被接受。这通常是插件错误——请报告。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Notes + embeddings + extracted entities. Reads keep working at 100%; only new ingests are blocked.
ast.target: 笔记 + 嵌入向量 + 提取的实体。读取操作保持100%正常；仅新的摄取操作被阻止。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Resets at UTC midnight. Past cap, files still embed for search — only the LLM extraction is skipped.
ast.target: 在UTC午夜重置。超过上限后，文件仍会进行嵌入以供搜索——仅跳过LLM提取。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Covers initial sync of a small vault. Starter ($29/mo) adds 50k welcome credits for bigger imports.
ast.target: 涵盖小型知识库的初始同步。入门版（$29/月）赠送5万欢迎积分，用于更大的导入。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Cursor → Settings → MCP → Add new server
ast.target: Cursor → 设置 → MCP → 添加新服务器

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Run this in your terminal — configures the Claude Code CLI to use HangarX as an MCP source.
ast.target: 在您的终端中运行此命令——配置Claude Code CLI使用HangarX作为MCP源。

ast.name: message
ast.source: unauthorized — invalid or missing bearer token
ast.target: 未授权 — 无效或缺失的 Bearer 令牌

ast.name: message
ast.source: HangarX plugin is missing workspaceId in settings. Open Obsidian Settings → HangarX and fill in Connection.
ast.target: HangarX 插件在设置中缺少 workspaceId。请打开 Obsidian 设置 → HangarX 并填写连接信息。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Rebuild started in background. Poll cortex_rebuild_status with this jobId — expect 1–10 min depending on graph size.
ast.target: 后台已开始重建。使用此 jobId 轮询 cortex_rebuild_status — 根据图大小，预计需要 1-10 分钟。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Desktop only — Claude Desktop config path unavailable on mobile.
ast.target: 仅限桌面端 — 移动端无法获取 Claude Desktop 配置路径。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 已断开连接 — 无配置文件。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 正在从 Cortex 获取实体…

ast.name: name
ast.source: Push vault to knowledge graph (no modal)
ast.target: 将保险库推送到知识图谱 (无模态框)

ast.name: name
ast.source: Sync current note to knowledge graph
ast.target: 将当前笔记同步到知识图谱

ast.name: name
ast.source: Diff vault ↔ graph (what's out of sync)
ast.target: 对比保险库 ↔ 图谱 (查看不同步内容)

ast.name: name
ast.source: Force re-ingest entire vault (after server reset)
ast.target: 强制重新摄取整个保险库 (服务器重置后)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 重建社区 + 重新索引 (快速重新摄取后)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 询问你的保险库 (侧边面板)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 询问你的保险库 (模态框)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将 URL 摄取到知识图谱

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Search starters by name, category, or content…
ast.target: 按名称、类别或内容搜索入门提示…

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 询问关于你保险库的任何问题…

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pick one to fill the chat composer. Type to filter.
ast.target: 选择一个以填充聊天编辑器。输入以筛选。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pick up where I left off yesterday. What was I working on at end of day, and what should I pick up first this morning? Cite the notes and quote the unfinished thread.
ast.target: 从昨天中断的地方继续。昨天结束时我在做什么，今天早上应该先处理什么？引用笔记并引用未完成的线索。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Generate today's standup: what I shipped yesterday (with note links), what's blocking me, and the top 3 things I should tackle today. Keep it tight.
ast.target: 生成今日站会：我昨天完成了什么（附笔记链接），什么阻碍了我，以及今天应该处理的最重要的三件事。保持简洁。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Show every unfinished `- [ ]` task across my vault, grouped by project. Sort by recency within each group. Flag anything overdue or with a due:: date.
ast.target: 列出我保险库中所有未完成的 `- [ ]` 任务，按项目分组。每组内按最近时间排序。标记任何逾期或带有 due:: 日期的任务。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Give me a high-level summary of my entire vault: the major themes, the projects I work on, the people and entities I mention most, and how recently each area has been active. Treat it like an exec summary of my second brain.
ast.target: 给我一个整个保险库的高级摘要：主要主题、我参与的项目、我最常提及的人物和实体，以及每个领域最近的活跃程度。把它当作我第二大脑的执行摘要。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Summarize what I've been working on this week. Group by project, highlight key decisions, and call out anything still open.
ast.target: 总结我本周的工作。按项目分组，突出关键决策，并指出任何仍未解决的问题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Run a weekly review: what I accomplished, what slipped, what I learned, and the 3 most important things for next week. Use my notes from the last 7 days as evidence.
ast.target: 进行每周回顾：我完成了什么，什么被推迟了，我学到了什么，以及下周最重要的三件事。使用我过去7天的笔记作为依据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Run a monthly retrospective. Major themes worked on, decisions made, projects shipped, projects abandoned, and patterns across my notes from the past 30 days.
ast.target: 进行月度回顾。过去30天笔记中的主要工作主题、做出的决策、完成的项目、放弃的项目以及模式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: List projects I've mentioned in the last 14 days but haven't touched in 7+ days. For each, surface the last note, who/what is blocking, and the most recent open question.
ast.target: 列出我在过去14天内提及但超过7天未接触的项目。对于每个项目，显示最后一条笔记、阻碍因素以及最近的未解决问题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: What are the top 5 themes I write about across my entire vault? For each theme, list the most foundational notes and the most recent ones.
ast.target: 我整个保险库中写得最多的5个主题是什么？对于每个主题，列出最基础的笔记和最近的笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: What have I learned this month? Pull novel concepts, frameworks, or insights I captured in notes — distinguish between things I actively studied and things I picked up incidentally.
ast.target: 我这个月学到了什么？提取我在笔记中记录的新概念、框架或见解——区分我主动学习的内容和偶然获得的内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Which concepts, frameworks, or mental models do I reference most often across notes? For each, summarize what it means in my own words and where I first introduced it.
ast.target: 我最常在笔记中引用哪些概念、框架或心智模型？请用我自己的话总结每个概念的含义，并说明我最初是在哪里引入它的。

ast.name: text
ast.source: What topics or entities appear frequently across my notes but don't have a dedicated note explaining them? Suggest 3-5 candidates worth writing up as MOC (map-of-content) notes.
ast.target: 哪些主题或实体在我的笔记中频繁出现，却没有专门的笔记来解释它们？请推荐3-5个值得撰写成MOC（内容地图）笔记的候选主题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Surface every book, paper, or article I've referenced across my notes. Indicate which ones I've actually read versus only cited.
ast.target: 列出我在笔记中引用过的所有书籍、论文或文章。请指出哪些是我实际读过的，哪些只是引用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Find all open tasks across my vault with a due date in the past. Sort by how overdue they are and surface the originating note.
ast.target: 找出我知识库中所有已过期的未完成任务。按逾期时间排序，并显示其来源笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Find notes I've created or edited in the last 7 days that don't have any tags, aren't linked from any other note, and aren't in a folder. Suggest a place for each one.
ast.target: 找出我在过去7天内创建或编辑的、没有标签、未被其他笔记链接、且不在任何文件夹中的笔记。请为每篇笔记建议一个存放位置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: What important decisions have I documented in the last month? For each one, give me the decision, the reasoning behind it, and any open questions left unanswered.
ast.target: 我在上个月记录了哪些重要决策？请为每个决策提供决策内容、背后的推理以及任何未解决的遗留问题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Find unresolved questions in my notes — places where I wrote something like "TODO research", "open question", or asked myself a question I never answered. Group by topic.
ast.target: 找出我笔记中未解决的问题——那些我写了“TODO研究”、“待解决问题”或自问自答的地方。请按主题分组。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Find topics where I've changed my mind over time — places where my recent notes contradict or revise my earlier ones. Surface the before/after with evidence.
ast.target: 找出我随时间改变想法的主题——那些我近期笔记与早期笔记相矛盾或修正的地方。请展示前后对比并提供证据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Find two ideas in my recent notes that seem unrelated but are actually connected through other concepts. Walk me through the path between them.
ast.target: 找出我近期笔记中两个看似无关但实际上通过其他概念相连接的想法。请为我梳理它们之间的路径。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Find pairs of notes that should probably reference each other but don't. Suggest links to add and explain why.
ast.target: 找出那些本应相互引用但实际没有的笔记对。请建议添加的链接并解释原因。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Identify ideas, concepts, or quotes that I've restated in multiple notes — possibly without realizing. Suggest which note should be canonical and which should link.
ast.target: 识别我在多篇笔记中重复阐述的想法、概念或引语——可能是在无意识中。请建议哪篇笔记应作为权威版本，哪些应链接至此。

ast.name: text
ast.source: List notes I've drafted but haven't come back to revise. Surface anything tagged #draft, marked TODO, or with FIXMEs in the body. Sort by age.
ast.target: 列出我已起草但未回来修订的笔记。显示所有标记为#draft、包含TODO或正文中有FIXME的笔记。按创建时间排序。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Find an outline-style note in my vault that I haven't fleshed out yet. Walk through what it would take to expand each bullet into full prose, citing supporting notes.
ast.target: 找出我知识库中一篇尚未充实的提纲式笔记。请逐步说明如何将每个要点扩展成完整段落，并引用支持性笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Surface 5-10 of my most quotable lines from notes I've written this year — original phrases, not citations from others. Include source note for each.
ast.target: 列出我今年写的笔记中最值得引用的5-10句话——原创语句，非他人引文。请注明每句话的来源笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: List the people I mention most across my notes. For each, summarize the context I usually mention them in and the last time I wrote about them.
ast.target: 列出我在笔记中最常提及的人物。请为每个人总结我通常提及他们的背景，以及我最后一次写到他们的时间。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pull every note that captures a conversation, meeting, or interview. Group by person/team and surface the key points and any follow-ups I committed to.
ast.target: 提取所有记录对话、会议或访谈的笔记。按人物/团队分组，并显示关键要点以及我承诺的后续行动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pick a random note from my vault and tell me three other notes I've written that connect to it in non-obvious ways. Show me the path.
ast.target: 从我的知识库中随机挑选一篇笔记，并告诉我我写的另外三篇笔记，它们以非显而易见的方式与之相关。请为我展示连接路径。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Surface something interesting I've forgotten — a note from 6+ months ago that's relevant to what I'm working on now, or an idea I had once and never followed up on.
ast.target: 展示一些我已遗忘的有趣内容——一篇6个月以上的笔记，它与我现在的工作相关，或者一个我曾有过但从未跟进的想法。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ↵ to send · ⇧↵ for newline · Esc (empty input) for new chat
ast.target: ↵ 发送 · ⇧↵ 换行 · Esc（空输入）开始新对话

ast.name: text
ast.target: 向你的知识库提问任何问题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Multi-hop search across your notes — cited, remembered, and shared with every AI agent on your machine.
ast.target: 跨笔记多跳搜索——被引用、被记忆，并与你机器上的每个AI代理共享。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 以使用知识库命令（同步、重建、去重）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Try a more focused question, or open the run trace below to see what the agent searched for.
ast.target: 请尝试一个更具体的问题，或打开下方的运行追踪查看代理搜索了什么。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Community-summary retrieval is empty — broad questions like "themes" need it.
ast.target: 社区摘要检索为空——像“主题”这样的宽泛问题需要它。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 重建社区 + 重新索引

ast.name: text
ast.source: No graph content matched this query. The vault may not be synced — try
ast.target: 没有图谱内容匹配此查询。知识库可能未同步——请尝试

ast.name: text
ast.target: 强制重新抓取整个知识库

ast.name: text
ast.source: Retrieval found content but the model wasn't confident. Try rephrasing to mention specific entities or note titles.
ast.target: 检索到了内容，但模型置信度不高。请尝试重新措辞，提及具体的实体或笔记标题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Graph is empty but your vault has notes.
ast.target: 图谱为空，但你的知识库有笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: below to wipe the local index and re-push every note.
ast.target: 以清除本地索引并重新推送所有笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Sign in to auto-create an API key and pick your workspace, or paste an existing key below.
ast.target: 登录以自动创建API密钥并选择你的工作区，或在下方粘贴现有密钥。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Set up HangarX in three steps

ast.name: text
ast.source: HangarX runs Postgres, FalkorDB, and the Cortex API on your machine via Docker. Pulls images from Docker Hub — no source code needed.
ast.target: HangarX通过Docker在你的机器上运行Postgres、FalkorDB和Cortex API。从Docker Hub拉取镜像——无需源代码。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Bakes your API key + provider keys into the file. Re-save anytime they change.
ast.target: 将你的API密钥和提供商密钥烘焙到文件中。密钥更改时随时重新保存。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠ Add a key in step 1 first — without one the saved file has no provider credentials and extraction will fail.
ast.target: ⚠ 请先在步骤1中添加密钥——没有密钥，保存的文件将没有提供商凭证，提取将失败。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Run this in your vault folder:
ast.target: 在你的知识库文件夹中运行此命令：

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠ Save the Compose file first — click "Save to vault" in step 2 above. Otherwise docker compose will exit with "no such file or directory".
ast.target: ⚠ 请先保存Compose文件——点击上方步骤2中的“保存到知识库”。否则docker compose将因“no such file or directory”而退出。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Prefer not to use a terminal? Paste this into Claude Code / Cursor / Cline:
ast.target: 不想使用终端？将此粘贴到Claude Code / Cursor / Cline中：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Save the updated YAML, then run the recreate command (or hand the docker step to an LLM agent).
ast.target: 保存更新后的YAML，然后运行重建命令（或将docker步骤交给LLM代理）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Verify with Cmd/Ctrl+P → "HangarX: Memory stats". Manage agents under the Agents section below.
ast.target: 通过Cmd/Ctrl+P → “HangarX: Memory stats”进行验证。在下方的“代理”部分管理代理。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 堆栈健康状况 — API离线

ast.name: text
ast.target: 堆栈健康状况 — 所有服务正常

ast.name: text
ast.source: No docker-compose.cortex.yml in your vault yet — run "Save to vault" in step 2 above.
ast.target: 你的知识库中尚无docker-compose.cortex.yml——请运行上方步骤2中的“保存到知识库”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Diagnostics & overrides — compose file, URL, workspace, API key
ast.target: 诊断与覆盖 — 组合文件、URL、工作区、API 密钥

ast.name: text
ast.source: Switch chat provider and model on the fly — no container restart. Stored encrypted on the server and overrides the docker-compose defaults at request time.
ast.target: 即时切换聊天提供商和模型 — 无需重启容器。数据在服务器端加密存储，并在请求时覆盖 docker-compose 的默认设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Make this vault available as a memory + context layer for AI agents on this machine — Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, or anything else that speaks MCP. Your notes, decisions, and project history become permanent agent context across sessions.
ast.target: 将此保险库设为本机 AI 代理（Claude Desktop、Claude Code、Cursor 或任何支持 MCP 的工具）的记忆与上下文层。您的笔记、决策和项目历史将成为跨会话的永久代理上下文。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enable the mcp server to expose memory tools to agents. The server only listens on localhost.
ast.target: 启用 MCP 服务器以向代理暴露记忆工具。服务器仅监听本地主机。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Advanced mcp details (port, token, manual config snippet)
ast.target: 高级 MCP 详情（端口、令牌、手动配置代码片段）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Manual config snippet (for tools without one-click connect)
ast.target: 手动配置代码片段（适用于不支持一键连接的工具）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Agent connectors are desktop-only — these clients don't run on mobile.
ast.target: 代理连接器仅限桌面端 — 这些客户端无法在移动设备上运行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Bridge script not yet generated. Toggle the mcp server off and on to regenerate.
ast.target: 桥接脚本尚未生成。请关闭并重新开启 MCP 服务器以重新生成。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 其他 MCP 兼容应用

ast.name: text
ast.source: Copy the snippet below into any client that speaks MCP (Zed, Goose, Codex CLI, custom agents).
ast.target: 将下方代码片段复制到任何支持 MCP 的客户端（Zed、Goose、Codex CLI、自定义代理）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Reach the same workspace from agents that don't run on this machine — Claude.ai web/mobile, ChatGPT desktop, or any agent on a cloud dev box. They authenticate against cortex.HangarX.ai/mcp using your API key.
ast.target: 让不在此机器上运行的代理访问同一工作区 — Claude.ai 网页/移动版、ChatGPT 桌面版，或云开发盒上的任何代理。它们将使用您的 API 密钥通过 cortex.HangarX.ai/mcp 进行身份验证。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Bring your own API keys. They're baked into the docker-compose YAML on disk and never sent to HangarX. After adding or changing any key, re-save the Compose file in Connection details to apply.
ast.target: 使用您自己的 API 密钥。它们被烘焙到磁盘上的 docker-compose YAML 文件中，绝不会发送到 HangarX。添加或更改任何密钥后，请在连接详情中重新保存 Compose 文件以应用更改。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Ollama setup: install Ollama (https://ollama.com), then run: ollama pull nomic-embed-text. The HangarX container reaches Ollama at host.docker.internal:11434.
ast.target: Ollama 设置：安装 Ollama (https://ollama.com)，然后运行：ollama pull nomic-embed-text。HangarX 容器通过 host.docker.internal:11434 访问 Ollama。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No API key set yet — paste one above to connect.
ast.target: 尚未设置 API 密钥 — 请在上方粘贴一个以进行连接。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 正在检查 API 密钥…

ast.name: text
ast.source: ✓ API key works (server doesn't expose identity details)
ast.target: ✓ API 密钥有效（服务器不暴露身份详情）

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠ Workspace ID is empty — set it below to enable sync and ask.
ast.target: ⚠ 工作区 ID 为空 — 请在下方设置以启用同步和询问功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ✗ This API key was rejected by the server. Confirm it was copied correctly from the dashboard, or generate a new one.
ast.target: ✗ 此 API 密钥被服务器拒绝。请确认已从仪表板正确复制，或生成一个新的。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open a note to see related results.
ast.target: 打开一个笔记以查看相关结果。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Cannot resolve graph anchor for this note.
ast.target: 无法解析此笔记的图锚点。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No direct path found in the graph.

ast.name: text
ast.source: The graph is empty. Run "hangarx: Sync vault to knowledge graph" from the command palette and check the devtools console for any ingest errors.
ast.target: 图为空。请从命令面板运行“hangarx: 将保险库同步到知识图谱”，并检查开发者控制台是否有任何摄取错误。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Running louvain + writing LLM summaries — can take 30–90s on large graphs…
ast.target: 正在运行 Louvain 算法并生成 LLM 摘要 — 在大型图上可能需要 30-90 秒…

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your vault becomes a knowledge graph that every AI agent on your machine can query.
ast.target: 您的保险库将变成一个知识图谱，您机器上的每个 AI 代理都可以查询。

ast.name: text
ast.source: All set — close this panel anytime.
ast.target: 一切就绪 — 随时关闭此面板。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 连接外部 AI 代理

ast.name: text
ast.target: 启动本地 MCP 服务器

ast.name: text
ast.source: HangarX: local stack out of sync

ast.name: text
ast.source: One click below saves the updated YAML and copies what you need next:
ast.target: 点击下方一键保存更新的 YAML 并复制下一步所需内容：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 保存并复制 docker 命令

ast.name: text
ast.target: 保存并复制 LLM 提示词

ast.name: title
ast.target: 将保险库推送到知识图谱

ast.name: title
ast.target: 将知识图谱导入保险库

ast.name: title
ast.target: 对比保险库 ↔ 知识图谱

ast.name: title
ast.target: 强制重新摄取整个保险库

ast.name: title
ast.source: Forget the saved cloud API key?
ast.target: 忘记已保存的云端 API 密钥？
